S.FORM: == Lucius Allen == 9 bulad 26 demiad, 1947 a mihca, Lucius Allen, miunduay. Lucius Allen nalecuhan i Kansas City, Kansas, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Lucius Allen i 1969 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 3, namapili' tu nu Seattle SuperSonics putiput.
S.PHON: == r~…æu ¶ius ar~…ær~…æ…ôn == * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, r~…æu ¶ius ar~…ær~…æ…ôn, miunduaj. r~…æu ¶ius ar~…ær~…æ…ôn nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i kansas ¶itj, kansas, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. r~…æu ¶ius ar~…ær~…æ…ôn i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ *, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu s…ôattr~…æ…ô sup…ôrsoni ¶s putiput.
S.FORM: == Lucius Allen == 9 bulad 26 demiad, 1947 a mihca, Lucius Allen, miunduay. Lucius Allen nalecuhan i Kansas City, Kansas, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Lucius Allen i 1969 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 3, namapili' tu nu Seattle SuperSonics putiput.
